source_document: East African Community Customs Management Act, 2004 (Revised Edition 2017)
notes: Tests are arranged to increase in difficulty from Test 1 to Test 12.
Each test uses a 45 to 60 minute time limit depending on difficulty.
Correct answers are randomized so consecutive questions do not repeat the same answer letter within a test.

tests.title: EACCMA Main Test 1
tests.instructions: Choose the best answer. Correct options are randomized so consecutive questions do not repeat the same answer letter.

questions.question: What is the second step after review by the Commissioner?

options.B: Appeal to the Tax Appeals Tribunal

questions.explanation: Appeal to the Tax Appeals Tribunal

questions.question: Into what procedures may imported cargo generally be entered?

options.C: Home consumption, warehousing, transhipment, transit, or export processing zones

questions.explanation: Home consumption, warehousing, transhipment, transit, or export processing zones

questions.question: What is the basic rule in section 47?

options.A: Only prohibited goods may be warehoused

questions.explanation: Dutiable goods may be warehoused
